---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. For example:

> I'm always frustrated when [...] because RevoSpeech does not currently
> support [...]

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the
feature or change you would like to see, including:

- What the user-facing API or CLI would look like
- How it would integrate with existing functionality
- Any configuration options or flags needed

```bash
# Example of the desired usage:
revospeech tts --voice new-voice --text "..."
```

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you
have considered. This helps us understand the design space and trade-offs:

- Alternative A: [...]
- Alternative B: [...]
- Why alternative A is less ideal: [...]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request
here:

- Mockups or diagrams
- Examples from other tools (e.g., how Coqui TTS / XTTS / Whisper handles this)
- Links to relevant papers or documentation
- Related issues (#NNN)
- Whether you are willing to help implement this feature
